ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the experiment */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Principal investigator of the experiment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the experiment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user who last updated the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the experiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment the simulation belongs to */,
  "simulation_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was run */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the simulation */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user who last updated the simulation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the simulation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the simulation was last updated */,
  "simulation_status" TEXT /* The current status of the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "checkpoints" (
  "checkpoint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each checkpoint */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation the checkpoint belongs to */,
  "checkpoint_name" TEXT /* Name of the checkpoint */,
  "co2_level" TEXT /* CO2 level at the checkpoint */,
  "zone" TEXT /* Zone of the simulation */,
  "clock_today_date" TEXT /* Date of the checkpoint */,
  "wheat_grain_wt" REAL /* Weight of wheat grains */,
  "wheat_aboveground_wt" REAL /* Weight of wheat above ground */,
  "crop_et" REAL /* Crop evapotranspiration */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the checkpoint */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user who last updated the checkpoint */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the checkpoint was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the checkpoint was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("checkpoint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_checkpoints_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "folders" (
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each folder */,
  "folder_name" TEXT /* Name of the folder */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the folder */,
  "path" TEXT /* File path to the folder */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the folder */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user who last updated the folder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the folder was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the folder was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("folder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "folders_simulations" (
  "folder_simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the folder-simulation relationship */,
  "folder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the folder */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("folder_simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_folders_simulations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_folders_simulations_folder_id FOREIGN KEY ("folder_id") REFERENCES folders ("folder_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* The user's password */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* A description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment or simulation */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment or simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the condition */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the experiment condition */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user who last updated the experiment condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the experiment condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the experiment condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_conditions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the condition */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the condition */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the simulation condition */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user who last updated the simulation condition */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the simulation condition was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the simulation condition was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_conditions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the file belongs to */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the data file */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the data file */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* The user who last updated the data file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the data file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the data file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation version */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the simulation */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* The user who created the simulation version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the simulation version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_versions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
